data.description: CHINA: NEW POLICIES TO BE INTRODUCED TO PROMOTE HIGH-QUALITY DEVELOPMENT OF THE SILVER ECONOMY.
Japan’s 10-year government bond yield increases 3.5 bps, reaching 2.145%.
CHINA WILL URGE PUBLICLY TRADED COMPANIES TO DISTRIBUTE CASH DIVIDENDS AND CONDUCT SHARE REPURCHASES AND CANCELLATIONS, ACCORDING TO AN OFFICIAL DOCUMENT.
AUSTRALIA HOUSEHOLD SPENDING (M/M) JAN: 0.3% (EST 0.4%; PREV -0.4%)
CHINA: MINIMUM BASIC OLD-AGE BENEFITS FOR RURAL AND NON-WORKING URBAN RESIDENTS TO RISE BY 20 YUAN PER PERSON PER MONTH.
AUSTRALIA IMPORTS (M/M) JAN: 0.8% (PREV -0.8%)
AUSTRALIA TRADE BALANCE JAN: A$2.631B (EST A$3.800B; PREV A$3.373B)
About 40% of employers say they have posted job listings with no real intention of hiring, according to a survey cited by Forbes. These are commonly referred to as “ghost jobs.”
Gen Z Workers Are Disproportionately Losing Jobs As AI Automates Entry-Level Work, While Older Employees Remain Relatively Protected For Now, according to reporting by Fortune.

ASIAN STOCK MARKETS RECOVERED SIGNIFICANTLY, WITH SOUTH KOREA’S KOSPI RISING BY 11%. THE S&P 500 AND NASDAQ 100 ALSO CONTINUED TO GAIN ON WALL STREET. OIL AND GOLD PRICES INCREASED DUE TO CONTINUING MIDDLE EAST TENSIONS AND COMMENTS FROM DONALD TRUMP ABOUT THE IRAN CAMPAIGN.
China’s 10-year government bond yield declines 0.5 basis point in early session.
CHINA: GOVERNMENT EDUCATION SPENDING TO EXCEED 4% OF GDP.
CHINA: TO SEEK BREAKTHROUGHS IN CORE TECHNOLOGIES FOR INTEGRATED CIRCUITS AND INDUSTRIAL MACHINE TOOLS ACROSS FULL INDUSTRIAL CHAINS — STATE PLANNER REPORT.
The Nikkei index in Japan advances further, last up 4.2%.
South Korea plans to decide by month-end whether to release crude oil from its strategic reserves to support industry, according to a lawmaker.
CHINA WILL CONTINUE TO REFORM PUBLIC HOSPITALS TO MAKE SURE THEY PROVIDE BETTER SERVICE FOR THE PEOPLE, ACCORDING TO AN OFFICIAL REPORT.
CHINA: ENERGY PRODUCTION TO REACH 5.8 BLN TONS OF STANDARD COAL EQUIVALENT OVER NEXT FIVE YEARS — OFFICIAL REPORT.
CHINA TO RAISE CORE DIGITAL ECONOMY VALUE-ADD TO 12.5% OF GDP, PEAK CARBON EMISSIONS BEFORE 2030 AND BETTER COORDINATE GLOBAL PRODUCTION FACTORS AND MARKET RESOURCES — OFFICIAL REPORT.
CHINA TO PROMOTE A CHILDBIRTH-FRIENDLY SOCIETY AND ACCELERATE AGRICULTURAL AND RURAL MODERNISATION OVER THE NEXT FIVE YEARS — OFFICIAL REPORT.

data.title: Visualize Group acquires BMM Testlabs in first-ever private equity transaction in regulated gaming market.110 characters
data.description: The Visualize Group ("Visualize"), a company based in New York and Las Vegas, has made history by completing the first-ever private equity acquisition in the North American regulated gaming testing and inspection market. This transaction, which took place on March 4, 2026, has received all necessary regulatory approvals across various global jurisdictions. This milestone marks a significant development in the industry and sets a precedent for future investments in the sector. The specific financial details and the scale of the acquisition have not been disclosed, but experts predict that this move will have a substantial impact on the market.
